titleStmt.title: SII 15.187: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 187. (A.R. No. 426 of 1926.) HUBḶI, HUBLI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Jaṁbukēśvara temple.
This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Kīlaka, Pushya, śu. 9, Friday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1248 A.D., December 25, Friday f.d.t. °23.

It records gift of lands to a number of Brāhmanas in the presence of the god Amṛitēśvara of rājadhāni-paṭṭaṇa Aṇṇigere, by Sarvādhikāri Malliseṭṭi at the request of his father-in-law Mahāpradhāna, Rāyadaṇḍādhipati Bīchiseṭṭi. A supplementary to the above epigraph records a gift of land by Kaluvara Siṅgagāvuṇḍa, for charities to be maintained on periodical pilgrimages to the god Viṭhala of Paṇḍaraṅge (i.e. Pandharpur).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē [.] jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ da
kiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra viśvāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
svasti srīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa bhujabaḷe pratāpa cakravartti srī kahnaradēvavarṣada
mūṟaneya kīlaka saṁvatsarada puṣya śurddha bhruguvāradaṁdu Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁ
tiyalli śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ rāyadaṁḍādhipati bīciseṭṭiyara nirūpadiṁ śrīmatu
sarvvādhikāri Aḷiya malliseṭṭiyaru srīmadrājadhānipaṭṭaṇaṁ Aṇnigereya śrī Amṛ
tēśvaradēvara sannidhānadalli srīmadanādiya baṇaṁjuvaṭṭanaṁ duppaḷiya horati
ḍugaḷu Eṁṭu hiṭṭu paṁcamaṭhadavara kayyali Ā Aḷiya malliseṭṭiyaru
nu dhāreya kaḷadukoṁḍu brahmapuri vṛtigaḷanu sahiraṇyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ
koṭṭa krama . srī māḷava nārāyaṇadēvaru bhāradvājagōtradavaru mādhavasuta kēśava bhaṭṭaru mā
dhavasuta sōmanāthabhaṭṭaru sōmanāthasuta ruṣiyaṇabhaṭṭaru rēcidēvasuta kṛṣṇa bhaṭṭaru
sutajanārddanabhaṭṭaru kēśavasuta viṣṇubhaṭṭaru caṁdradēvasuta nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaru trivikramasu
ta purṣōttamabhaṭṭaru brahmadēvasuta mādhavabhaṭṭaru rēciyaṇasuta muppaḍibhaṭṭaru
tiyanasuta nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaru basavidēvasuta svāmibhaṭṭaru jāmadagnavatsagōtrada
siṁhasuta viṣṇubhaṭṭaru vāgīśvarasuta kāvadēvabhaṭṭaru narasiṁhasuta lakṣmīdharabhaṭṭaru
hasuta brahmadēvabhaṭṭaru bhānusuta yōgibhaṭṭaru saptanāthasuta dāsyaṇabha
vāgīśvarasuta nāgadēvabhaṭṭaru koṁmaṇasuta nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaru dēvatu bharadvāja
jāmadagnaru Aṁtu vṟittiyeppattavoṁdu . kāśyapagōtradavaru lakṣmīdharasuta mādha
ru mallidēvasuta kāvadēvabhaṭṭaru janārdanasuta saptanāthabhaṭṭaru nārāyaṇasuta sōmanā
tha bhaṭṭaru virupākṣasuta baladēvabhaṭṭaru Upēṁdrabhaṭṭaru viśāmitragōtradavaru kēśava suta
dēvabhaṭṭaru rāyabhaṭṭasuta brahmadēvabhaṭṭaru jātavēdasuta ravidēvabhaṭṭaru Ātrēya
ru dēvaṇnasut�bhāskarabhaṭṭaru Allāḷapirumāḷasuta cūḍāmaṇigaḷu gōviṁda
vabhaṭṭaru mallidēvasuta tippaṇabhaṭṭaru srīrāmasuta ravidēvabhaṭṭaru kauṁḍiṁnya gōtrada
vasuta māIbhaṭṭaru hariharasuta rudrabhaṭṭaru kēśavasuta mādhavabhaṭṭaru lakṣmīdha
rasvatibhaṭṭaru Antu vritti hadineṁṭu . srīvatsagōtradavaru gaṇapatisuta mādhava bhaṭṭa
suta viṣṇubhaṭṭaru cauṁḍarāyasuta srīrāmabhaṭṭaru gautamagōtradalli vāmana suta
ṭṭaru kausikagōtradalli rāṭṭayaṇasuta veṇnabhaṭṭaru vāsiṣṭagōtradalli viṣṇusu
bhaṭṭaru cakrapāṇisuta mallidēvabhaṭṭaru sāṁkhyāyanagōtradalli gau
ta sōmanāthabhaṭṭasya dvayavṟitti haritagōtrada�kṣmīdharasuta sudarṣana
trada brahmadēvasuta sōmanāthabhaṭṭaru Agastyagōtrada Ādityasuta lakṣmīdhara
geya cauṁḍarāyabhaṭṭaru kāśyapagōtrada mahadēvasuta hariharabha
dvājagōtrada kēśavasuta Amritēśvarabhaṭṭaru Oṇahaḷḷiya bhāradvājagōtra
hasuta kāvadēvabhaṭṭasya trayavrutti . Īṁtī vṛttigaḷige Īkkida kṣē
riṁdavu baḍaga muṁdāgi karavagiyiṁdavu mūḍa muṁdāgi Oṇaha
davu teṁka muṁdāgi Ayvatta Eraḍu gēṇa ghaḷeyalli pratyēka vrittige yiṁ mmattaru
tta Ēḷu vṛttigevū haḷḷa baṭṭeyayidu sahita nūra
ttaru keyi . Ī vṟittigaḷige yikkida graha hāsanabeḷḷiya ba
ma vīthiyiṁ mūḍa muṁdāgi kaluvara pṟithuviseṭṭiya ba
laguḍḍe yiṁda teṁka muṁdāgi kōṭeya haḷeya huttiṁ paḍuvalu
dalu hadinālku kainīḷa Aṟugaiyagalada nivēśana voṁbattu kai
hmapuriya kēriya teṁkaṇa kōṭeya haḷeya huttiṁ
nūru keyyagalada nivēśanavanu baṇabekoṭhārakke yikkidaru . yeṁ
ya kērivūḷage koṭaru bādarigarige teṟe mānyaṁ Ī brahmapu
ya siṁgavaḍḍige suṁka mānya daṁḍa dōṣa Aputrikavilla . bahubhirvva
garādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . sāmānyō
ṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bavadbhi sarvvānētānubhāvina
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra . dānaṁ ca pālanaṁ cayva niśrēya
tsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harē
rvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī paṁḍaraṁgeya śrī viṭhaladēvara vāriya śrīharidi
naṁgaḷa dharmmakke kaluvara siṁgagāvuṁḍanu koṭṭa vṛtti voṁdu .
Digital edition of SII 15.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
